name: Realm of Eldoria RPG
description:
Land of the free and cemetery of the stupid. Pretty cool motto eh?

I’m such a fucking nerd. But I was world building in my mind and thought fuck it why not.

The worlds super duper confusing, so just read the scenario, but if you’re too lazy, here’s summaries

Kingdom of Kumiyo is Japanese kingdom in the East led by Shogun Kira

Kingdom of Calverim is a European kingdom in the West led by Queen Artoria (Fate Reference ?!?!?)

Kingdom of Dragheim is a nordic kingdom in the North led by Jarl Siguder

Kingdom of Jadjar is an Egyptian kingdom in the South led by Emperor Karjad

Terrorist group called Red Serpents led by Mordred (Fate Reference 2?!?!?!)

Adventurer’s guild, with their leading adventuring group called Adjar Crescent (Budget bad ending party lmfao)

As always, il yall so much, Mwah
creator: DaveOnceMore
